en_us.summary: A context-runtime correctness release for stable Codex replay, valid tool groups, and bounded workspace tooling.

sections.title: Highlights
items: Codex HTTP full replay is now the authoritative context instead of a proxy-managed tail continuation.
Tool-call batches and matching results stay atomic, including mixed internal and client-tool batches.
Workspace file, directory, and search tools now use bounded, paginated output for large repositories.
Added in-app release notes with version-pinned GitHub lookup and bundled offline fallback.

sections.title: Fixed
items: Fixed proxy-side replay trimming causing cache resets, oscillating context size, and lost historical context.
Fixed incomplete tool-call histories that could produce upstream tool-protocol errors.

zh_cn.summary: 一次聚焦上下文运行时正确性的更新，改进 Codex replay 连续性、工具协议完整性和 workspace 工具边界。

sections.title: 重点更新
items: Codex HTTP full replay 现在作为权威上下文处理，不再使用代理管理的尾部 continuation。
工具调用批次和对应结果保持原子完整，包括内部工具与客户端工具混合批次。
workspace 文件、目录和搜索工具现在为大型仓库提供有界、可分页的输出。
新增应用内更新日志，支持按版本读取 GitHub 内容和内置离线回退。

sections.title: 修复
items: 修复代理侧 replay 裁剪导致的缓存重置、上下文使用率跳动和历史上下文丢失。
修复不完整工具调用历史可能触发上游工具协议错误的问题。

en_us.summary: A focused agent-stability hotfix for client tool recovery and upstream diagnostics.

sections.title: Highlights
items: Repeated client tool failures now remain visible to the model instead of becoming terminal proxy errors by default.
Follow-up requests such as "continue" no longer inherit a stale client tool handoff stop.
Upstream response decode failures now include safer diagnostics for network, proxy, and upstream troubleshooting.

sections.title: Fixed
items: Fixed legitimate troubleshooting workflows being interrupted after several failing shell command handoffs.
Fixed repeated patch or shell failures being able to affect later continuation requests.

zh_cn.summary: 一次聚焦 Agent 稳定性的热修复，改进客户端工具恢复与上游诊断。

sections.title: 重点更新
items: 重复客户端工具失败默认继续回填给模型处理，不再直接变成代理层终止错误。
“请继续”等后续请求不再继承旧的客户端工具 handoff 停止状态。
上游响应体解码失败现在会记录更安全的网络、代理与上游诊断信息。

sections.title: 修复
items: 修复正常排障流程中多个 shell_command 失败后被过早中断的问题。
修复重复 apply_patch 或 shell 失败可能影响后续继续请求的问题。

en_us.summary: Release-readiness and desktop updater stability improvements.

sections.title: Highlights
items: Added in-app update checks, download progress, cancellation, and passive installation on supported desktop builds.
Added Codex runtime catalog diagnostics and safer experimental Codex App model-list integration.
Improved full-context replay handling around Codex App model switches.

zh_cn.summary: 发布准备与桌面更新稳定性改进。

sections.title: 重点更新
items: 新增应用内检查更新、下载进度、取消下载和受支持桌面包的被动安装。
新增 Codex runtime catalog 诊断，并加固实验性 Codex App 模型列表集成。
改进 Codex App 切换模型时的 full-context replay 处理。

en_us.summary: A stability and billing-display update for long-running agent tasks.

sections.title: Highlights
items: Added DeepSeek peak and off-peak billing estimates, enabled by default.
Improved Vision tool configuration layout and scoped right-click Select all to the active page or input.
Improved usage billing buckets by model and billing period.

zh_cn.summary: 面向长时间 Agent 任务的稳定性与计费显示更新。

sections.title: 重点更新
items: 新增并默认开启 DeepSeek 峰谷计费估算。
优化识图工具配置布局，并将右键全选限制在当前页面或输入框。
按模型和计费时段拆分用量计费桶。

en_us.summary: A stability and experience update for the Rust and Tauri desktop line.

sections.title: Highlights
items: Refined Usage, Logs, settings, screenshots, and release-facing desktop UI.
Added optional DeepSeek Flash and Pro selection in Codex App while keeping CodeSeeX-side switching as the recommended path.
Improved Web Search probing, evidence opening, fallback behavior, and diagnostics.

zh_cn.summary: Rust 与 Tauri 桌面版本线的一次稳定性和体验更新。

sections.title: 重点更新
items: 优化 Usage、Logs、设置、截图和发布相关的桌面 UI。
可选在 Codex App 中选择 DeepSeek Flash / Pro，仍建议优先从 CodeSeeX 内切换。
优化 Web Search 的源探针、证据打开、fallback 行为和诊断。
